top_signals.title: Trump Says He’ll Let Ukraine Make Patriot Missiles. It Won’t Be Easy
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump’s suggestion on Wednesday that he would allow Ukraine — desperate for missile defenses after withering Russian strikes — to build its own Patriot interceptors won’t be easy or quick.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices jump more than 5% after Trump threatens to bomb Iran and reimpose naval blockade
top_signals.summary: Speaking at the NATO summit in Turkey, Trump said he considered the ceasefire with Iran over. His comments came after U.S. airstrikes overnight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says he's 'not sure' he wants Iran deal as Hormuz Strait strife deepens
top_signals.summary: CENTCOM said it launched dozens of strikes on Iranian military infrastructure and small boats; Trump said the U.S. might take more military action "tonight."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Texas port fuels automotive expansion with Mitsubishi deal, infrastructure upgrades
top_signals.summary:
Port Freeport adds new vehicle imports, secures $11 million grant and celebrates Volkswagen and Höegh milestones.

The post Texas port fuels automotive expansion with Mitsubishi deal, infrastructure upgrades appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
